channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole or concrete collapse, 15th June
item.description:
On the pavement where all the grey boxes are

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass is so long it is obscuring my view when reversing out of my drive causing a hazard. Also it is making the neighbourhood look scruffy, 15th June
item.description:
Grass verges outside No’s 47 - 43 Larkhay Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhay Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass at skatepark, 15th June
item.description:
Broken glass and rubbish at Cooper's edge skatepark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree pulling on overhead broadband line, 15th June
item.description:
I would like to report an issue with the trees lining the pavements on Gratton Road, Cheltenham. In particular, the tree outside of 60/62 Gratton Road is causing issues with the overhead broadband line. One of the branches is seriously pulling on the overhead line, threatening to bring it down. I think that all the trees on the road require some degree of maintenance as they have reached quite an immense height.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Gratton Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bin, 15th June
item.description:
Next to parking lay-by

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tobyfield Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 15th June
item.description:
Large pothile pleasr inspect thanks
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 15th June
item.description:

item.title: Beer boxes and large nitrous oxide cannisters, 15th June
item.description:
Half way along gravel put lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Fawley Drive, Noverton, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface problem, 15th June
item.description:
Customer reports that a raised paving slab at the location has caused a pedestrian to trip and fall; they were attended to by an ambulance crew. Please can this be investigated.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Cirencester Road leading to Little Witcombe - pavement narrowed by weeds growing in detritus, 15th June
item.description:
Cirencester Road leading to Little Witcombe - pavement narrowed by weeds growing in detritus. Also lots of sand and grit at kerb edge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cirencester Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury

item.description:

item.title: Obstruction caused by wall/building problem, 15th June
item.description:
Customer reports that they have attempted to access the PROW at the location, but the resident of Mill House has prevented them doing so; they report that the footpath has been sealed up (there is no signage). Ostensibly, it seems as though walkers are entering a private driveway. They ask that it is made clear that this a usable PROW which is accessible.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: You can't make this stuff up!, 15th June
item.description:
This is a genuine photo taken on 11/06/2026. The car was not stopped at the junction, it was parked with no one inside right on the exit road from the medical centre! The only way this idiocy is going to stop is with double yellow lines, appropriate signage and enforcement!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sapphire Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th June
item.description:
28day with 3 way traffic lights please cut overgrown brambles back to boundary approx 250m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th June
item.description:
ENWD with Standard TM please place x2 footway closed signs on either side of overgrown hedges obstructing full width of footway. (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 15th June
item.description:
